# StatementFlow | AI Credit Card Statement Analyzer

StatementFlow is a specialized AI application designed to parse, analyze, and visualize credit card statements. It leverages the Google Gemini 2.0 Flash model to extract high-fidelity transaction data from PDF and text-based statements.

## Project Details
- **Website**: https://statementflow.brilworks.com
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/drdhavaltrivedi/credit-card-statement-analyzer
- **Organization**: Brilworks (https://brilworks.com)

## Core Capabilities
- **Automated Extraction**: Zero-shot parsing of transaction date, description, amount, category, and type.
- **Privacy First**: Local-first processing architecture ensuring sensitive financial data is handled securely via API.
- **Financial Intelligence**: Built-in logic for multi-bank statement formats (Amex, Chase, etc.).
- **Data Visualization**: Real-time dashboarding for spending trends and category distribution.

## Technical Stack
- **Framework**: React 19 + Vite
- **AI Model**: Google Gemini 2.0 Flash
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Visualization**: Recharts

## API Usage
The application uses the `@google/genai` SDK to communicate with the Gemini API. It requires a `GEMINI_API_KEY` environment variable.

## Deployment
Deployed on Vercel with automated CI/CD from GitHub. Optimized for performance and SEO.
